headline: Is it Time to Sell Blackstone Stock Amid Rising Private Credit Woes?
summary: BX faces heavy redemptions in its $82B BCRED fund as private credit worries mount and shares drop 28% in three months. Is it time to rethink the stock?

headline: Why Blackstone and BlackRock Can Ride Out the Private-Credit Storm
summary: There may be little that  Blackstone  or  BlackRock  can do to stop the runaway train of negativity about private credit.  Last week, the two giant fund managers both reported that they faced jumps in first-quarter redemption requests from their flagship nontraded private-credit funds, which cater to wealthy individual investors.  What got much less attention, however, was that Blackstone’s flagship nontraded real-estate fund recently had its best month for investor flows in years.
